Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

Class VersionMixin.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF>
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestMixin.Builder<VersionMixin,VersionMixin.Builder>
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention.VersionMixin.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
RestBuilder<VersionMixin.Builder>
Enclosing class:
VersionMixin
public static class VersionMixin.Builder extends RestMixin.Builder<VersionMixin,VersionMixin.Builder>
Builder for VersionMixin instances.

Mirrors VersionProvider.Builder's configuration methods on the mixin's own surface and forwards each call to an underlying VersionProvider.Builder, which builds the shared worker the mixin delegates to.

Extends RestMixin.Builder so the mixin's bespoke worker-config setters chain with true covariant returns alongside the inherited RestBuildersurface (e.g. path, roleGuard). The worker config is forwarded once into VersionProvider.Builder and the REST config is inherited once from AbstractRestBuilder — no triplication across the Version flavors.

    • entry

      public VersionMixin.Builder entry(String key, String value)
      Sets a single entry, overwriting any prior value for that key.
      Parameters:
      key - The entry key. Must not be null or blank.
      value - The entry value (a null value is recorded as VersionMixin.UNKNOWN).
      Returns:
      This object.

      public VersionMixin.Builder entries(Map<String,String> values)

      values - Entries to add. null values are recorded as VersionMixin.UNKNOWN.

      This object.
